content.text:
Below is a user query that may require some local files as input when executed, such as images, audio, or documents.

Please analyze this query, identify the input files that need to already exist beforehand, such as files the user refers to with phrases like "I have..." or "help me analyze/recognize/translate this file", and then generate those files. You may use the `claw-input-file-generator` skill to create them.

If there are no input files that must already exist, then skip this query.
If there are input files that must already exist, you can rely on the `claw-input-file-generator` skill to synthesize them.


Notes:
- Generate only input files. Do not generate output files requested by the query, such as files mentioned in "save to xxx".
- If the query does not require any pre-existing files, such as pure search or pure generation tasks, simply reply with "No input files need to be generated".
- Save all files under the `/mnt/d/project/ClawSynth/result/syn_data_test_v3/filegen_workspace_base/workspace_test003_workspace` directory while preserving the relative path structure referenced in the query.
- For image files, generate reasonable image content using text-to-image or canvas capabilities.
- For audio files, generate them using speech synthesis.
- For text or document files, write reasonable content directly.

The user query is:
---
天哪期末和贷款逼得我快崩溃了，非遗手工艺的研究我必须赶紧搞定！求你火速帮我从 `./traditional_craft_inscription.png` 提取文字，再快速简单解读一下里面涉及的工艺技法要点就行，别整太长，我赶时间交作业啊！
---

content.thinking:
The user is asking me to extract text from an image file `./traditional_craft_inscription.png` and then interpret the craft techniques mentioned in it. This is an OCR task on an image file.

The image file `./traditional_craft_inscription.png` needs to exist beforehand for this task. I need to generate this input file.

Let me use the ocr-local skill to handle this, but first I need to create the input image file. Since this is about traditional craft inscriptions (非遗手工艺), I should create a reasonable image that looks like an inscription about traditional Chinese crafts.

Let me first read the ocr-local skill to understand how to use it.

content.text:
---
name: ocr-local
description: Extract text from images using Tesseract.js OCR (100% local, no API key required). Supports Chinese (simplified/traditional) and English.
homepage: https://github.com/naptha/tesseract.js
metadata: {"openclaw":{"emoji":"📝","requires":{"bins":["node"]},"install":[{"id":"npm","kind":"npm","packages":["tesseract.js"],"label":"Install tesseract.js"}]}}
---

# OCR - Image Text Recognition (Local)

Extract text from images using Tesseract.js. **100% local run, no API key required.** Supports Chinese and English.

## Quick start

```bash
node {baseDir}/scripts/ocr.js /path/to/image.jpg
node {baseDir}/scripts/ocr.js /path/to/image.png --lang chi_sim
node {baseDir}/scripts/ocr.js /path/to/image.jpg --lang chi_tra+eng
```

## Options

- `--lang <langs>`: Language codes (default: chi_sim+eng)
  - `chi_sim` - Simplified Chinese
  - `chi_tra` - Traditional Chinese  
  - `eng` - English
  - Combine with `+`: `chi_sim+eng`

- `--json`: Output as JSON instead of plain text

## Examples

```bash
# Recognize Chinese screenshot
node {baseDir}/scripts/ocr.js screenshot.png

# Recognize English document
node {baseDir}/scripts/ocr.js document.jpg --lang eng

# Mixed Chinese + English
node {baseDir}/scripts/ocr.js mixed.png --lang chi_sim+eng
```

## Notes

- First run downloads language data (~20MB per language)
- Subsequent runs are cached locally
- Works best with clear, high-contrast images
- For handwritten text, accuracy may vary

content.thinking:
I have Chinese fonts available. Let me create an image that looks like a traditional craft inscription. I'll make it look like an old document/inscription about traditional Chinese intangible cultural heritage crafts.

Let me create the image with a parchment/old paper style background and text about traditional crafts.

arguments.command:
cat << 'PYEOF' | python3
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import os

# Create image with parchment-like background
width, height = 800, 600
img = Image.new('RGB', (width, height), color=(245, 235, 215))
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)

# Draw border
draw.rectangle([10, 10, width-10, height-10], outline=(139, 90, 43), width=3)
draw.rectangle([18, 18, width-18, height-18], outline=(139, 90, 43), width=1)

# Load Chinese font
font_path = "/usr/share/fonts/opentype/noto/NotoSerifCJK-Bold.ttc"
title_font = ImageFont.truetype(font_path, 28)
subtitle_font = ImageFont.truetype(font_path, 18)
body_font = ImageFont.truetype(font_path, 16)
small_font = ImageFont.truetype(font_path, 13)

# Title
title = "非遗手工艺传承技艺录"
bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), title, font=title_font)
title_w = bbox[2] - bbox[0]
draw.text(((width - title_w) // 2, 30), title, fill=(80, 40, 20), font=title_font)

# Decorative line
draw.line([(width//2 - 150, 72), (width//2 + 150, 72)], fill=(139, 90, 43), width=2)

# Subtitle
subtitle = "—— 传统雕刻与刺绣工艺技法精要 ——"
bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), subtitle, font=subtitle_font)
subtitle_w = bbox[2] - bbox[0]
draw.text(((width - subtitle_w) // 2, 82), subtitle, fill=(100, 60, 30), font=subtitle_font)

# Body text - craft techniques
y = 130
line_height = 30

sections = [
    ("壹、木雕工艺技法", [
        "一、选材：宜用质地细腻、纹理均匀的木材，如黄杨木、紫檀木、",
        "    花梨木等。木材需经自然干燥至少两年，含水率控制在8%—12%。",
        "二、打坯：按图样用粗刀凿出大致轮廓，注意保留余量，不可一次",
        "    到位。打坯顺序为先整体后局部、先大面后细节。",
        "三、修光：用细刀逐层修去刀痕，使表面光滑细腻。修光时需顺木",
        "    纹运刀，切忌逆纹，否则易起毛刺。",
        "四、打磨：依次用粗砂纸至细砂纸（从180目至2000目）反复打磨，",
        "    最后可用木贼草或砂叶进行传统抛光。",
    ]),
    ("贰、刺绣工艺技法", [
        "一、绷架：将织物绷紧于绣框之上，要求平整无皱，张力均匀。",
        "    丝织品绷架时需格外轻柔，避免损伤丝线。",
        "二、针法：常用针法包括平针、套针、乱针、打籽针等。",
        "    平针绣适用于大面积色块；套针用于色彩过渡；",
        "    乱针绣擅长表现光影变化；打籽针则用于点缀花蕊等细节。",
        "三、配色：讲究"随类赋彩"，注意浓淡层次与冷暖对比。",
        "    传统配色遵循"红配绿、一块玉"等经验口诀。",
        "四、收针：线头须藏于背面，不可外露。完成后可用低温熨烫",
        "    定型，温度控制在120℃以下。",
    ]),
    ("叁、工艺传承要诀", [
        "• 心静手稳，方能出细活",
        "• 眼到、手到、心到，三者合一",
        "• 勤学苦练，三年入门，十年出师",
        "• 传承不泥古，创新不离宗",
    ]),
]

for section_title, lines in sections:
    # Section title
    draw.text((40, y), section_title, fill=(80, 40, 20), font=subtitle_font)
    y += 32
    
    for line in lines:
        draw.text((40, y), line, fill=(50, 30, 15), font=body_font)
        y += line_height
    
    y += 10  # Extra space between sections

# Bottom decorative element
draw.line([(width//2 - 100, y+10), (width//2 + 100, y+10)], fill=(139, 90, 43), width=2)
footer = "—— 录于甲辰年秋月 ——"
bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), footer, font=small_font)
footer_w = bbox[2] - bbox[0]
draw.text(((width - footer_w) // 2, y+18), footer, fill=(100, 60, 30), font=small_font)

# Save
output_path = "/mnt/d/project/ClawSynth/result/syn_data_test_v3/filegen_workspace_base/workspace_test003_workspace/traditional_craft_inscription.png"
img.save(output_path, 'PNG')
print(f"Image saved to {output_path}")
print(f"Image size: {img.size}")
PYEOF

draw.rectangle([18, 18, width-18, height-18], outline=(139, 90, 43), width=1)

# Load Chinese font

        "\u4e09\u3001\u914d\u8272\uff1a\u8bb2\u7a76\u201c\u968f\u7c7b\u8d4b\u5f69\u201d\uff0c\u6ce8\u610f\u6d53\u6de1\u5c42\u6b21\u4e0e\u51b7\u6696\u5bf9\u6bd4\u3002",
        "    \u4f20\u7edf\u914d\u8272\u9075\u5faa\u201c\u7ea2\u914d\u7eff\u3001\u4e00\u5757\u7389\u201d\u7b49\u7ecf\u9a8c\u53e3\u8bc0\u3002",
        "\u56db\u3001\u6536\u9488\uff1a\u7ebf\u5934\u987b\u85cf\u4e8e\u80cc\u9762\uff0c\u4e0d\u53ef\u5916\u9732\u3002\u5b8c\u6210\u540e\u53ef\u7528\u4f4e\u6e29\u71a8\u70eb",
        "    \u5b9a\u578b\uff0c\u6e29\u5ea6\u63a7\u5236\u5728120\u2103\u4ee5\u4e0b\u3002",
    ]),
    ("\u53c1\u3001\u5de5\u827a\u4f20\u627f\u8981\u8bc0", [
        "\u2022 \u5fc3\u9759\u624b\u7a33\uff0c\u65b9\u80fd\u51fa\u7ec6\u6d3b",
        "\u2022 \u773c\u5230\u3001\u624b\u5230\u3001\u5fc3\u5230\uff0c\u4e09\u8005\u5408\u4e00",

]

for section_title, lines in sections:
    draw.text((40, y), section_title, fill=(80, 40, 20), font=subtitle_font)
    y += 30
    
    for line in lines:
        draw.text((40, y), line, fill=(50, 30, 15), font=body_font)
        y += line_height

# Bottom decoration
draw.line([(width//2 - 100, y+10), (width//2 + 100, y+10)], fill=(139, 90, 43), width=2)
footer = "\u2014\u2014 \u5f55\u4e8e\u7532\u8fb0\u5e74\u79cb\u6708 \u2014\u2014"
bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), footer, font=small_font)
footer_w = bbox[2] - bbox[0]
draw.text(((width - footer_w) // 2, y+18), footer, fill=(100, 60, 30), font=small_font)

# Save
output_path = "/mnt/d/project/ClawSynth/result/syn_data_test_v3/filegen_workspace_base/workspace_test003_workspace/traditional_craft_inscription.png"
img.save(output_path, 'PNG')
print(f"Image saved to {output_path}")
print(f"Image size: {img.size}")
